contract.goal: Record the guild-validate panel verdict produced by the workflow fired during checkin 01's unit.
rules_applied: loop owns all loom writes; workflow was read-only fan-out

actions: Fired the guild-validate panel as a workflow (run wf_ce71346b-692) mid-unit, after checkin 01
Awaited the verdict across the async boundary; the loop resumed with the result intact

changes_since_previous: Resolution checkin. The panel ran as a workflow between checkins 01 and 02; this records its verdict. No loom write occurred while the workflow was in flight.
notes_for_pr: Integration probe: the panel ran as a workflow fired mid-unit by the loop; the manifest stayed coherent across the async await, and checkin numbering stayed monotonic (01 -> 02).
